description: Approved evaluation dataset identity, provenance, and the CI variables it implies. Mirrors model-baseline.json for the data side: dataset.sha256 is the integrity pin the dataset-download job verifies the staged fixture against (DATASET_EXPECTED_SHA256), and build_ai_bom.py reads this file to stamp license + source provenance onto the CycloneDX `data` component (which otherwise carries only a digest). This is the single reviewed source of truth for the approved dataset — change it (and re-run) to roll the dataset forward.

provenance.transform: parquet_to_jsonl.py — map text->prompt, synthesise deterministic id, tag category=prompt-injection, carry similarity

license.citation: Gandalf the Red: Adaptive Security for LLMs (arXiv:2501.07927)
